arts.ttl: Tuchel must bear the oppressive weight of England’s history
arts.sum: The new head coach was bullish about his side’s prospects for World Cup qualification, which begins against Albania So, Thomas Tuchel, was the ball over the line? And, yes, we are still talking about it. “I don’t think so,” the new England head coach replied. “But there was no VAR so it stands.” Ah, Thomas. You’re on our side now. And if you want to earn the right to sing the national anthem, you are going to have to do better than this. More seriously, though, as Tuchel throws himself into the challenge of managing England and moving on from the inconvenience of his German passport, this was an instructive exchange. arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says he is "taken for granted" and feels people have become "bored" of his goalscoring record.

arts.ttl: England captain Harry Kane believes fans are ‘bored’ by his goalscoring ability
arts.sum: The 31-year-old is the country’s record goalscorer with 69 and shows no signs of slowing down.

arts.ttl: Stick to football: Thomas Tuchel has no interest in 'political statements' as England head coach
